title: The Trap Tightens Around the Alliance
description: Pages 21–22 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #25 as sanji becomes entangled with Violet while Law’s Green Bit exchange collapses into a trap involving Doflamingo and Fujitora.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Simula- Neously: All over the world

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Special Edition!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Special Edition!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: There's a revision in the news!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: That big news about DoFlamingo ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Was a mistake !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What a mess ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Green bit

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You used the power of the world government in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Just to fool the ten of us...!! You would deceive the whole world !!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Just like in a big magic show... the secret to the trick is hidden somewhere quite simple

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Law

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: "It could never be so simple" ... that fixed mission- caption...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Presents the perfect blind spot ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You're a pirate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Even a ShichiBukai wouldn't have that kind of authority!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Someone with the power to do something so outrageous....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Only the likes of the celestial dragons could manage that!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: You don't know anything of Joker's past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And that will be your downfall!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: you. Could you be ....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Fufuffu Ffu... It's a much deeper story than that

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: but in any case... law! I've been wanting to kill you!!

summary: Pages 21–22 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
